typography.fontFamily: 'Atkinson Hyperlegible', 'Lexend', 'Nunito', 'Comic Sans MS', 'Chalkboard SE', system-ui, sans-serif

components.buttons: rounded 10px or pill, min-height 56px for age band, hover via filter brightness, no transform scaling
components.cards: surface or activity-surface with 1px border, low shadow, no coloured side stripes and no nested cards
components.badges: pill labels with text and shape markers, no colour-only meaning
components.feedback_correct: soft ok tint, check icon and concrete microcopy
components.feedback_incorrect: soft warn tint, retry icon and a specific hint, never punitive red
components.tabs: role=tablist, aria-selected, neutral botanical labels for Apoio, Intermedio and Desafio, not traffic-light colours
components.grid: stable 4x4 square grid, chunky block tiles, selected tiles use primary terrain fill and visible pattern

impeccable.scene: Pares de criancas de 7-8 anos usam tablets numa sala com luz natural, enquanto a professora circula e pede que expliquem a descoberta com palavras suas.

notes: A paleta aproxima-se de relva e madeira sem depender de assets Minecraft. O tamanho base de 22px, h1 de 40px e alvos de 56px respeitam leitores de 7-8 anos e reforcam a hierarquia visual. A equivalencia fica na interacao e no feedback progressivo, nao no titulo inicial.
